title: Kiel, Schleswig-Holstein — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kiel, Schleswig-Holstein: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kiel is a city in Schleswig-Holstein with a population of 246,000. The sailing capital on the Baltic Sea, home to the world-famous Kiel Week regatta, a major naval port, and a lively maritime culture.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
